name: Old Fashioned Sea Foam Candy
recipeInstructions:
1. In a heavy-bottomed saucepan, combine the sugar and corn syrup. Cook over medium heat until boiling, stirring constantly.
2. Continue cooking until the mixture reaches 300°F on a candy thermometer (hard crack stage).
3. Remove from heat and let cool slightly. In a separate bowl, mix in the baking soda until incorporated.
4. Immediately pour the mixture into a prepared 9x13-inch pan lined with foil or buttered parchment paper.
5. Allow to set completely, then break up into pieces when cooled.
6. Dip the candy pieces in chocolate confectioners' coating.
